title: SMO 1
description: Changes the default disc music to the soundtrack from Super Mario Odyssey
body:
5- Broodals Battle

11- Opening (In the Skies Above Peachs Castle…)

13- Capture T-Rex!

blocks- Fossil Falls

cat- Title

chirp- Tostarena Ruins

far- Inside the Inverted Pyramid

mall- Mario, Travel the World (The Odysseys First Takeoff)

mellohi- YOU GOT A MOON! 1

otherside- Before the Broodal Battle

pigstep- Story Intro 1

relic- Top-Hat Tower

stal- Meeting Cappy

strad- Bonneton

wait- The Adventure Begins

ward- Madame Broode Battle

Please donate to AbleGamers to help "create opportunities that enable play for people with disabilities and improve their quality of life while prioritizing two core objectives: enabling people with disabilities to access video games with ease and empowering game creators and developers to design games with maximum accessibility".

https://ablegamers.org
